doc: A gate is an INSTRUMENT only if a negative control proves it FAILS on a known-bad input. 'gates' maps each proven gate tool (relpath) to the pytest nodeid of its negative control; a nodeid counts only if it resolves to a top-level (pytest-collectable) test AND its test file references the gate module (static linkage; behavioral proof is delegated to the test-py* CI run). 'unproven' is the VISIBLE, reviewed debt list of gate tools with no such negative control -- not an immutable baseline: it may shrink (prove a gate) or grow (admit a new decorative-risk gate), but growing it is an explicit, auditable line in the diff, not a silent bypass. gate_soundness.py ratchets: any discovered gate that is neither proven nor listed here fails --check closed.

tools/claim_coverage.py.rationale: Feeds a manifest claim_id absent from claims.yaml and asserts FAIL.

tools/complexity_gate.py.rationale: Feeds a function above the ceiling with no allowlist entry and asserts FAIL.

tools/determinism_probe.py.rationale: Feeds a generator writing a timestamp and asserts it is flagged nondeterministic.

tools/intent_contract.py.rationale: Feeds an unratified intent and asserts the meaning-closure gate FAILs.

tools/lint_fail_open.py.rationale: Feeds an except-handler that returns 0 and asserts the detector flags it fail-open.

tools/quality_dashboard.py.rationale: Forces one dimension's --check to FAIL and asserts the composite propagates FAIL.

tools/validate_artifact_schema.py.rationale: Feeds a governed artifact missing artifact_type and asserts validate() returns not ok.

tools/validate_claim_audit.py.rationale: Parametrized decorative/soft-state rows; asserts audit reports failures for each.

tools/validate_current_truth.py.rationale: Stale truth pointer with no freeze block yields evaluate_freshness status FAIL.

tools/validate_markdown.py.rationale: Parametrized bare count literals; asserts find_count_literals flags each.

tools/validate_openai_2026_claims.py.rationale: Unsupported 'validated by OpenAI' surface is flagged by _scan_forbidden.

tools/validate_real_eeg_case.py.rationale: Tampered BF10 in committed verdict makes --check exit 1 with 'drifted'.

tools/validate_redteam_matrix.py.rationale: Forged SURVIVED->PASS matrix is rejected for the survived-but-PASS reason.

tools/validate_truth_contract.py.rationale: Forbidden overclaim phrases are detected by find_forbidden_claims.

tools/verify_grounding.py.rationale: Bogus fact numbers make check() return a non-empty violation list.
